**The Portland Fire have made a strong start to their WNBA journey, selecting 11 players in the expansion draft.** 
## Context / Background
The Portland Fire are set to make their WNBA debut in 2026, and the expansion draft was their first major step in building a competitive team. With 11 players selected, the Fire have a solid foundation to work from.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Player | Position | Previous Team |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Bridget Carleton | Guard | Minnesota Lynx |
| Other players | Various | Various teams |

## Key Quote
> 'Better than anyone expected': The Portland Fire's expansion draft haul has been praised by experts and fans alike.

## What's Next?
The Portland Fire will now look to build on their expansion draft success, with the 2026 WNBA season fast approaching. With a strong roster in place, the Fire will be looking to make a big impact in their debut season.
